name: Avery Island Hot Bread
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Olive oil or chili oil
1 tbsp Regular honey or chili honey
recipeInstructions:
1. Ensure all ingredients are at room temperature.
2. Add all the ingredients to the bread machine in the order specified for white bread.
3. Set the machine to make a white bread loaf.
4. The Tabasco sauce, sourced from Avery Island, Louisiana, gives this bread its signature kick.
5. For an authentic flavor, use chili honey and pepper-flavored vodka. Regular vodka can be substituted if needed.
